languages.text: Кабели проводят энергию огромной мощности, но поблизости не видно ни единого топливного бака.

traits.locale_text: Кабели проводят энергию огромной мощности, но поблизости не видно ни единого топливного бака.

languages.text: The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.
languages.original_text: Кабели проводят энергию огромной мощности, но поблизости не видно ни единого топливного бака.

traits.locale_text: The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.

The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.

languages.text: 这些线缆传输的能量强大得惊人，可这附近却连一个燃料罐都看不到。
languages.original_text: The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.

traits.locale_text: 这些线缆传输的能量强大得惊人，可这附近却连一个燃料罐都看不到。

languages.text: Los cables transmiten una cantidad inmensa de energía, pero no ves ningún tanque de combustible por la zona.
languages.original_text: The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.

traits.locale_text: Los cables transmiten una cantidad inmensa de energía, pero no ves ningún tanque de combustible por la zona.

languages.text: Les câbles véhiculent une quantité titanesque d'énergie, mais vous n'apercevez aucun réservoir de carburant à proximité.
languages.original_text: The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.

traits.locale_text: Les câbles véhiculent une quantité titanesque d'énergie, mais vous n'apercevez aucun réservoir de carburant à proximité.

languages.text: Kablolar, muazzam bir güçte enerji iletiyor ancak yakında tek bir yakıt tankı bile göremiyorsun.
languages.original_text: The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.

traits.locale_text: Kablolar, muazzam bir güçte enerji iletiyor ancak yakında tek bir yakıt tankı bile göremiyorsun.

languages.text: Die Kabel leiten enorme Energiemengen, aber du siehst nicht einen Treibstofftank.
languages.original_text: The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.

traits.locale_text: Die Kabel leiten enorme Energiemengen, aber du siehst nicht einen Treibstofftank.

languages.text: このケーブルは、莫大なエネルギーを伝導している。しかし、燃料タンクは、どこにも見当たらない。
languages.original_text: The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.

traits.locale_text: このケーブルは、莫大なエネルギーを伝導している。しかし、燃料タンクは、どこにも見当たらない。
